description: Point mesh makes geometry data of a cloud of points that have UVs, scales, colors, and more. These points can be displayed via a Mesh Renderer using a Unlit Material with at least it's ``UseBillboardGeometry`` field set to true.

fields.Points: The positions of each vertex point.
fields.Sizes: The sizes of each vertex point.
fields.Rotations: The rotations of each vertex point.
fields.Colors: The vertex color of each vertex point.
fields.ColorsProfile: The color profile of each vertex point.
fields.UVs: The UV center and quad scales of each vertex point.
fields.Sort: Enable sorting the mesh vertex indices by distance from ``SortPoint``.
fields.SortPoint: The point to sort by distance from.

usage: Not usually usable by the user without Mods, as most fields depend on arrays.
